name: Chicken and Cashews
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, boned and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve granules in hot water. Set aside.
2. Stir cornstarch and soy sauce into cold water; set aside.
3. Heat oil in a pan. Add chicken pieces and stir-fry until opaque.
4. Add carrots and onion to the pan. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
5. Add bouillon mixture and cover the pan.
6. Simmer over medium heat for 3-4 minutes.
7. Add frozen peas, mushrooms, and remaining soy sauce.
8. Stir-fry until the mixture thickens.
9. Stir in cashews.
10. Serve hot chicken mixture over cooked rice.
